description.p: A longbow carved from dark, dense wood, its grain shot through with faint silver striations. You have a +1 bonus to attack rolls made with this magic weapon.
Arrows fitted with padded or rounded tips. They deal bludgeoning damage instead of piercing and are typically used for nonlethal takedowns.
Arrows wrapped in oil-soaked cloth near the head, meant to be lit before firing. They deal fire damage instead of piercing on a hit, and may ignite flammable surfaces at the DM's discretion.
A close-fitting wrap of layered cloth and light hide, humming faintly with contained wind.
While wearing this armor, you gain an Armor Class equivalent to leather armor. Once per long rest, you can grant yourself advantage on one ranged attack roll.

A compact traveling kit of files, oils, and whetstones bearing a stamped maker's mark. Once per day, outside of combat, you can spend 10 minutes maintaining a weapon with this kit to grant it a +1 bonus to damage on its next hit.
A small charm meant to be fastened to a single weapon. Once attached, it cannot be moved without breaking its bond.
Once per long rest, if you miss an attack roll with the weapon this charm is attached to by 5 or less, you can reroll the attack roll. You must use the same weapon the charm is bonded to.
A small lantern that burns with a magical pink-purple flame. It can ignite mundane objects, but the flame never harms the lantern itself.

Fog Veil. The lantern holds 1 hour of fog magic per long rest, usable in increments of 10 minutes. While active, it creates a 10-foot subtle fog aura around you. Against hostile creatures only, the fog increases their degree of obscurement toward you by one step: fully visible becomes lightly obscured, lightly obscured becomes heavily obscured, and heavily obscured causes their first attack against you each turn to be made with disadvantage. If a creature has already clearly spotted you, the effect does not apply to that creature until line of sight to you is broken for at least 1 round.
A deep brown leather pack with red stitching, a crimson arrowhead charm, and subtle vine tooling worked into the straps.

Shared Pocket. This pack is magically linked to a matching pack carried by another creature. A non-living item smaller than a loaf of bread and placed in the shared pocket transfers to the linked pack after 6 seconds, with no reduction in weight. Double-tapping the pack causes the linked pack's charm to warm briefly as a soft alert.
